name: PaLM 2
note: Powered Bard in 2023; basis for Med-PaLM 2 and Codey; PaLM API decommissioned Aug 15 2024.

results.notes: PaLM 2-L on BIG-Bench Hard, as reported in PaLM 2 Technical Report (Table 6), 3-shot CoT

Flan-PaLM 2 (L), instruction-tuned, 5-shot MMLU. From Table 16 (Appendix A.2, instruction-tuning ablation) -- explicitly labeled 'Flan-PaLM 2 (L)' in the paper, matching the instruction-tuned variant already anchoring the existing BBH=78.1 entry.

Flan-PaLM 2 (instruction-tuned), 8-shot chain-of-thought (no self-consistency) on GSM8K, from Table 7. (With self-consistency/64 samples the paper reports 92.2%; 84.7% is the single-decode CoT figure, more comparable to pass@1.)
Flan-PaLM 2 (instruction-tuned), 4-shot chain-of-thought (no self-consistency) on MATH, from Table 7. (With self-consistency the paper reports 45.2%.)

Flan-PaLM 2 (instruction-tuned), 8-shot chain-of-thought (no self-consistency) on MGSM, from Table 7; independently cross-confirmed by the identical 75.9 figure for 'Flan-PaLM 2 (L)' in the Table 16 appendix ablation.
Instruction-tuned PaLM 2 (L), 5-shot WinoGrande, from Table 5 (section 4.3 Reasoning).
PaLM 2-L (base, not instruction-tuned), 1-shot, TriviaQA (EM), Table 2 'English QA and classification tasks' of the PaLM 2 Technical Report. Confirmed verbatim via full-text fetch of the arXiv PDF.
PaLM 2-L (base, not instruction-tuned), 1-shot HellaSwag, Table 2 of the PaLM 2 Technical Report. Confirmed verbatim via full-text fetch of the arXiv PDF.
PaLM 2-L (base, not instruction-tuned), 1-shot RACE-H reading comprehension, Table 2 of the PaLM 2 Technical Report.
PaLM 2-L (base, not instruction-tuned), 1-shot PIQA, Table 2 of the PaLM 2 Technical Report.
PaLM 2-L (base, not instruction-tuned), 1-shot OpenBookQA, Table 2 of the PaLM 2 Technical Report.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real: announced by Sundar Pichai at Google I/O on 2023-05-10 (blog.google, TechCrunch, Axios all corroborate). Technical report (arXiv 2305.10403) submitted 2023-05-17, matching evaluatedAt. Fetched full-text (ar5iv) Table 6: PaLM 2-L scores exactly 78.1 on BBH 3-shot CoT vs PaLM's 65.2 -- score confirmed verbatim. PaLM API decommission date of Aug 15 2024 corroborated independently. Params were never disclosed by Google (kept null, correctly).
